title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Tupperware India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Tupperware India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Tupperware India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Tupperware India South Asia Partners:
Tupperware India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India South Asia Partners!
